headline: The NASDAQ Dropped 3% as Micron, Intel, and AMD Tumble, but One Tech Name Is Bucking the Trend
summary: CNBC’s Dominic Chu opened Tuesday’s market coverage with a familiar tape pattern that has not shown up much in 2026. “The tech sell-off that began Monday building momentum this morning after memory chip related shares tanked on Asian markets overnight,” Chu told viewers, and damage in U.S. premarket concentrated exactly where expected. headline: Wall Street Says AI Is Slowing. Taiwan Semiconductor’s Latest Move Says Otherwise.

headline: Seagate (STX) Gets Fresh Backing As An AI Data Storage Winner
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) has been spotlighted as a key AI infrastructure beneficiary as attention on AI-driven data storage grows. Kiplinger's recently included Seagate among its top stocks to buy, citing its role in supporting AI data growth. Morgan Stanley analysts highlighted Seagate's position in cloud storage and demand tied to AI applications. Seagate's CEO described the current phase as a new era for the company focused on AI-led data storage. Seagate Technology...
